def negative_adapter_boundary_missing_for_external_payload_shape():
    rule_id = "adapter_boundary_missing_for_external_payload_shape"
    family = "architecture"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag code that lets raw third-party dicts, tuples, or response objects spread through unrelated modules without normalization."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
